name: writing_executor
description: 文本渲染。5个测试用例，覆盖中英文混合

input.text: Hello 中文 English 世界

cases.expected: Hello 中文 English 世界

input.text: This is a very long text to test rendering of extended text content that exceeds typical line lengths and contains multiple sentences with various punctuation marks, special characters, and word combinations to ensure proper handling of complex text layouts and rendering performance.

cases.expected: This is a very long text to test rendering of extended text content that exceeds typical line lengths and contains multiple sentences with various punctuation marks, special characters, and word combinations to ensure proper handling of complex text layouts and rendering performance.
